emails.subject: Re: 22nd
emails.body: Re: 22nd I know we overan SST in COH. Our nom was lower, but the retro increased. Alvin Joanne were checking TCO. We are hoping they don't cut us and don't want to tip them that they could.

emails.subject: Re: 22nd

emails.subject: Re: 22nd
emails.body: That makes sense. So you really are not using any ENA space but then I need to check the overrun charges on the invoice. If its ok with you, I think I'll just wait to review the invoice before I do anything with that. 12/27/2000 08:47 AM Jeffrey Porter@EES Jeffrey Porter@EES Jeffrey Porter@EES 12/27/2000 08:47 AM 12/27/2000 08:47 AM
